subject: DIAGNOSTIC: BUG-10/11/12 + topology clarification — Mac dashboard vs Chromabook autonomous

body.summary: Three additional bugs found (watcher wrong directory, health monitor writes nothing, CI monitor silent). CRITICAL TOPOLOGY CLARIFICATION: the Mac meshd instances (psy-session port 8082, ops-session port 8083) serve as dashboard/API servers for the human operator. The Chromabook meshd runs the ACTUAL autonomous pipeline. Bugs 1-12 were diagnosed on the Mac instances. The Chromabook's meshd may or may not share these bugs — we cannot verify from here.

topology.key_distinction: Mac instances should NEVER spawn deliberations — they serve dashboards. Chromabook instance should spawn deliberations — it runs the autonomous pipeline. Bugs 1-9 affect dashboard display accuracy. Whether they affect Chromabook autonomous processing depends on whether Chromabook runs the same meshd binary with the same config.

new_bugs.title: Watcher monitors wrong transport directory
new_bugs.detail: Filesystem watcher detects messages at /Users/kashif/Projects/meshd/transport/sessions/ (30 stale sessions) instead of /Users/kashif/Projects/psychology-agent/transport/sessions/ (78 live sessions). Inherits BUG-1 repo_root. New messages written this session never detected.
new_bugs.affects: Mac dashboard only (watcher on Mac). Chromabook watcher status unknown.

new_bugs.title: Health monitor writes zero observations
new_bugs.detail: health_observations table contains 0 rows despite 15-second health monitor running since startup. All health-check events absorbed by Gc layer. Health endpoint returns static 'healthy' default — not derived from actual observations.
new_bugs.affects: Mac dashboard (displays false 'healthy'). Chromabook health monitoring status unknown.

new_bugs.title: CI monitor produces no output
new_bugs.detail: Started 5 times, monitors 5 repos at 300s interval, but zero CI status results in logs. Likely inherits BUG-3 (no GITHUB_TOKEN — cannot call GitHub API).
new_bugs.affects: Mac dashboard (no CI data). Chromabook CI monitoring status unknown.

chromabook_questions: Does Chromabook meshd use the same binary (/Users/kashif/Projects/meshd/meshd) or a different build?
Does Chromabook meshd's repo_root resolve correctly to the agent project directory?
Does Chromabook have a deliberation_log with actual entries?
Why did autonomous commits stop after 2026-03-15T18:42 while human-mediated commits continued through 2026-03-17?
Did the cron deprecation (Session 91) remove the trigger for autonomous-sync.sh without the self-oscillation replacement being active?
Does the Chromabook meshd have GITHUB_TOKEN in its environment?

autonomous_pipeline_timeline.gap: ~46 hours without autonomous activity. Human-mediated sync continued (Chromabook user sessions).
autonomous_pipeline_timeline.hypothesis: Cron deprecated Session 91. Self-oscillation not yet active (shadow mode). No trigger drives autonomous-sync.sh. The Chromabook human operator runs /sync manually during interactive sessions, producing the human-mediated commits. The autonomous pipeline stopped when cron stopped.

epistemic_flags: All 12 bugs diagnosed on Mac meshd instances. Chromabook meshd status inferred from git history and heartbeat files — not from direct observation. The Chromabook may have different bugs, the same bugs, or no bugs.

The 'cron deprecated, oscillator in shadow mode, no deliberation trigger' hypothesis fits the timeline but remains unverified. The Chromabook may have stopped for a different reason (crash, config change, manual halt).

The distinction between dashboard-server meshd (Mac) and autonomous-agent meshd (Chromabook) was not documented in any architecture file. This represents a topology assumption that should be made explicit.

action_gate.gate_condition: Ops to: (1) verify Chromabook meshd config and bug status, (2) clarify whether Mac instances should share the same meshd binary as Chromabook or use a dashboard-only variant, (3) document the two-population topology in mesh architecture docs.
